segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, please. I'm new here, so I'm not sure what the usual flow is.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: No worries. The service will start with a couple of songs, then announcements and the message.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. That helps. I'm Jongkuk, by the way.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: I'm Grace. Nice to meet you.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Nice to meet you too. I just moved to Boston for school.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'm starting a PhD program in architecture.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Very big. I'm trying to find a healthy rhythm early.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. If I seem a little lost, I'm still learning both Boston and the service order.
